subject: ISA deadline: £3,200 of your 2025/26 allowance still available
pre_header: Your ISA allowance doesn't carry forward - use it or lose it by 5 April

slot_values.heading: ISA deadline reminder
slot_values.subheading: Make the most of your remaining allowance

blocks.html: The tax year ends at 23:59 on 5 April 2026, which means your ISA allowance for 2025/26 will soon reset. Any unused allowance does not carry forward to the next tax year.
Based on your current ISA activity, you have used £16,800 of your £20,000 ISA allowance for the 2025/26 tax year, leaving £3,200 still available to invest.

blocks.heading: Important note
blocks.body: Unused allowance does not carry forward to 2026/27

blocks.label: Top up your Stocks & Shares ISA

blocks.html: This information is not a personal recommendation for any particular investment. If you are unsure about the suitability of an investment you should speak to one of our advisers. Tax rules can change and their effects depend on your individual circumstances. The value of investments can fall as well as rise and you may get back less than you invest.
